title: Athletic teams
doc_html:
§2115.8.  Athletic teams

No law, rule, or policy shall prohibit members of athletic teams at any public elementary and secondary school from engaging in voluntary, student-initiated, student-led prayer.

Acts 1995, No. 264, §1.
